items.title: Anti-biofilm activity of coated zinc oxide nanoparticles in a water-in-oil formulation against Cutibacterium acnes
items.description: Coated ZnO-NPs demonstrated antibacterial and biofilm-disrupting activities against Cutibacterium acnes in a high-viscosity, skincare-mimicking water-in-oil formulation.
